title: Rayher, 3-tier stackable Craft Storage with adjustable compartments, clear plastic Box Organiser for small arts and crafts materials
features: Organise all your craft supplies with this multifunctional three-tier box, the compartments can be tailored to your needs, the two top trays can be divided into up to eight separate compartments, removable dividers are included so you can create multiple storage options for beads, wire, tape, thread and brushes, ribbons and embellishments, your jewellery making kit and for all your art and needlework materials, the bottom tier offers enough space for modelling tools, craft knives, scissors, pliers, glue and pens

An ideal portable organiser with handle for all your valuable scrapbooking, jewellery making or sewing necessities, with the translucent stackable tiers your craft accessories are easy to locate and the two sturdy latches on each tray ensure that your arts and crafts supplies are safe and secure

This space-saving storage solution enables convenient storing and the compartment trays can be expanded to meet your needs, just stack and connect units together to build your own custom storage item, that way have your materials organised and your craft desk decluttered

A multi-purpose hobby box suitable for keeping your electronic accessories like earphones, chargers and batteries neatly arranged or organise your office items with these handy storage containers, this compartment box makes also a perfect sewing box and we are sure you will find even more uses for it around your home

External dimensions: 23,1 x 15,6 x 18,5 cm (9” x 6” x 7 3/8” approx.) Two trays with up to 8 adjustable compartments One tray with one large compartment in the size of 15,6 x 18,5 x 6 cm (6” x 7 3/8” x 2 3/8” approx.)
description: From the manufacturer Rayher Just Creative At Rayher, we have everything that sparks creativity! In the Rayher shop, creative fans will find a large selection of products and product proposals for their creative activities, DIY and handmade. Our extensive selection includes paper of all kinds, stamps, paints, casting and model making, jewellery making materials, children's products, accessories, seasonal and seasonal decoration and special occasions. With the 20,000 products on offer you huge choice and excellent quality. So everyone will find the equipment and tools they need, both beginners and DIYers from Sunday to DIY as well as hand-made professionals. Looking for ideas? On our website you will find more than 400 creative ideas in various areas as well as various DIY techniques with detailed instructions to try straight away. So you can always find inspiration for your own creations or create ideas that we sugg. With filter options you can target by theme, technique, completion time and difficulty level to find ideas and tips faster and easier. Following our motto: Being creative makes you happy. Everything that awakens creativity is at Rayher.
